message:
fix(mysql): Suppress false positive clippy warning in commit()

The `self.committed = true` assignment in SharedMySqlTransaction::commit()
is read by the Drop impl to determine if rollback logging is needed.
Clippy doesn't trace this through async/await and drop, so it incorrectly
flags it as unused.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
